mapper.select: SELECT SUM(v.votes_cast_count) AS totalVotes, g.* FROM galgame_twelve_voting v LEFT JOIN galgame g ON v.galgame_subject_id = g.subject_id WHERE v.edition = #{edition} GROUP BY v.galgame_subject_id ORDER BY totalVotes DESC

SELECT v.id, v.votes_cast_count, g.subject_id, g.img_url, g.translated_name FROM galgame_twelve_voting v LEFT JOIN galgame g ON v.galgame_subject_id = g.subject_id WHERE v.user_uin = #{uin} AND v.edition = #{edition} GROUP BY v.galgame_subject_id
SELECT SUM(v.votes_cast_count) AS votesCastCount FROM galgame_twelve_voting v WHERE v.user_uin = #{uin} AND v.edition = #{edition}

SELECT v.id, v.votes_cast_count, g.subject_id, g.img_url, g.translated_name, g.original_name, g.rank, g.number_of_ratings, g.info, g.score, t.total_votes FROM galgame_twelve_voting v LEFT JOIN galgame g ON v.galgame_subject_id = g.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT galgame_subject_id, SUM(votes_cast_count) AS total_votes FROM galgame_twelve_voting WHERE edition = #{edition} GROUP BY galgame_subject_id ) t ON v.galgame_subject_id = t.galgame_subject_id WHERE v.user_uin = #{uin} AND v.galgame_subject_id = #{subjectId} AND v.edition = #{edition}

SELECT total_rank FROM ( SELECT galgame_subject_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(votes_cast_count) DESC) AS total_rank FROM galgame_twelve_voting WHERE edition = #{edition} GROUP BY galgame_subject_id ) AS rank_table WHERE galgame_subject_id = #{subjectId}

SELECT SUM(v.votes_cast_count) AS totalVotes FROM galgame_twelve_voting v LEFT JOIN galgame g ON v.galgame_subject_id = g.subject_id WHERE v.galgame_subject_id = #{subjectId} AND v.edition = #{edition} GROUP BY v.galgame_subject_id
